name: Thai Sweet Chili Sauce Vmxv03a
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Fresh lime or lemon juice
1/2 tsp All-purpose flour mixed with 1 T cold water
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients and 1/2 cup of water in a small saucepan.
2. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce the heat and let simmer for 4 minutes.
4. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
5. Store in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
